subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which city served as the capital before Jaipur became the capital of Rajasthan?
question_hi: जयपुर पहले राजस्थान की राजधानी थी किस शहर?
explanation_en: Jodhpur served as the capital of Rajasthan before Jaipur became the capital. It was known as Rao Jodha ki Kanya Utsav Mahal.
explanation_hi: जोधपुर राजस्थान की राजधानी केंद्र के पहले किस शहर था?
Rao Jodha ki Kanya Utsav Mahal
